What are the different types of genetic tests? 
URL of this page: https://medlineplus.gov/genetics/understanding/testing/types/ 
What are the different types of genetic tests? 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
Many types of genetic tests are available to analyze changes in genes, chromosomes, or proteins. A health care provider will consider several factors when selecting the appropriate test, including what condition or conditions are suspect
